message:
Reformat patterns.rs regression test cases for readability

Apply rustfmt-style formatting to all Case struct literals in the
regression_classification test module. Previously, test cases were
written as single-line struct literals which made them hard to scan
and caused lines to exceed 100 characters. Each Case is now formatted
with one field per line, making diffs cleaner and improving readability
when adding or modifying test scenarios.

Also reformats multi-argument assert! macros to place each argument
on its own line, consistent with the project's formatting conventions.

No behavioral changes -- this is purely a formatting pass over
approximately 1200 lines of test code across these test functions:
- regression_cargo_compilation_positive
- regression_cargo_never_intercept
- regression_cargo_compilation_negative
- regression_rustc_positive
- regression_shell_unsafe_reject
- regression_wrapper_normalization
- regression_non_compilation_passthrough
- regression_tiered_classification_details
- regression_cd_then_compile_pattern
- regression_agent_workflow_patterns
- regression_false_positive_resistance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
